response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced senior developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and extensive experience may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level role. His technical skills (TypeScript, React, databases) match well, but his career trajectory suggests he may seek more responsibility than this role offers.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, directly relevant to the role.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and integrating diverse data sources (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz).
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing, demonstrating collaboration and learning ability.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role; may lack long-term interest or growth potential in this position.
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL experience (preferred in the job description).
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current remote-friendly roles (e.g., re:cinq).
